faq_items.q: Can I turn a photo into chibi?
faq_items.a: Yes. Upload a reference photo and add a short note. The AI chibi maker will create a cute anime-style result that you can preview and download.

faq_items.q: What can I use it for?
faq_items.a: Use your chibi image as a profile avatar, sticker idea, character concept, fan art reference, or a cute social media post.
Yes. You can generate chibi characters at no cost. No sign-up or credit card required. Just type your prompt or upload a photo and hit generate.
Most chibi images are ready in 5 to 15 seconds. Complex prompts with detailed descriptions may take a few seconds longer.
We offer Classic Chibi, Kawaii Soft, Emoji & Sticker, and Portrait Chibi styles. Each produces a different look so you can pick the one that fits your use case.

faq_items.q: Can I use the result commercially?
faq_items.a: Generated images are yours to use for personal projects, social media, and non-commercial purposes. For commercial use such as merchandise or paid products, please check our terms page for details.

faq_items.q: Do I need to create an account?
faq_items.a: No. You can generate and download chibi art without creating an account or logging in.

index_styles.title: Chibi Styles
index_styles.description: Explore the different looks you can create with our AI chibi generator.
index_styles.item1_body: Big head, tiny body, oversized eyes — the timeless anime look everyone loves.
index_styles.item2_body: Pastel colors, rounded shapes, and gentle expressions for an extra-cute vibe.
index_styles.item3_body: Minimal detail, bold lines, and transparent-friendly designs perfect for messaging.
index_styles.item4_body: A refined chibi face with detailed hair and clothing for profile pictures.
index_tips.title: Tips for Best Results
index_tips.description: Follow these simple guidelines to get the cutest chibi characters every time.
index_tips.item1_body: Mention hair color, clothing, accessories, and expression for accurate results.
index_tips.item2_body: For photo-to-chibi, upload well-lit, front-facing images with visible features.
index_tips.item3_body: Classic for anime fans, Kawaii for soft aesthetics, Emoji for stickers and reactions.
index_tips.item4_body: Try different prompts and styles — you can generate unlimited previews.
index_info.item1_body: Generate your first chibi images at no cost. No credit card required.
index_info.item2_body: Most chibi characters are ready in under 30 seconds.
index_info.item3_body: Download crisp, printable PNG images suitable for profiles, stickers, and prints.
